description: baseline
Increase learning rate from 0.01 to 0.1 to potentially achieve faster convergence and better accuracy with SGD optimizer.
Switch optimizer from SGD to AdamW which often provides better convergence and generalization on CIFAR-10.
Reduce learning rate to 0.005 to provide more stable convergence with SGD and cosine annealing scheduler.
Add dropout of 0.3 to regularize the model and potentially improve generalization performance.
Increase the number of epochs from 10 to 15 to allow the model more training time which should improve convergence and validation accuracy.
Switch from ReLU to GELU activation function which often provides better performance on image classification tasks.
Add residual connections to the CNN architecture to improve gradient flow and enable better feature learning.
Increase the model capacity by doubling the number of filters in each convolutional layer (64, 128, 256) to improve feature representation capability.
Enable color jitter data augmentation to improve model generalization through additional training data variety.
Increase batch size from 128 to 256 to improve training stability and potentially better convergence while staying within the time budget.
Increase the FC hidden layer size from 256 to 512 to improve the model's capacity for learning complex feature representations.
Add a fourth convolutional block with 256 filters to increase model depth and feature representation capacity without significantly impacting training time.
Increase learning rate to 0.015 to achieve faster convergence while maintaining the stable SGD+cosine annealing setup that achieved the current best accuracy.
Add gradient clipping with max norm 1.0 to improve training stability and potentially achieve better convergence.
Increase learning rate to 0.012 for slightly faster convergence while staying closer to the stable 0.01 baseline that achieved good results.
Switch from cosine annealing to step scheduler with step size of 5 epochs to potentially improve learning rate decay timing for the 15-epoch training.
Increase learning rate to 0.013 to find the optimal point between the current best 0.01 and the too-high 0.015 that was tried earlier.

Reduce weight decay from 1e-4 to 5e-5 to reduce regularization strength and potentially allow the model to fit the training data better while maintaining generalization.
Reduce weight decay further from 5e-5 to 2e-5 to continue the trend of reducing regularization strength that improved accuracy in the previous experiment.
